title: CAPI (Companion API) Endpoint Reference
description: Endpoints available on the Frontier Companion API

GET /profile.description: Commander profile - ships, cargo, location, missions
GET /profile.caveats: Check commander.docked before using market/shipyard data

GET /market.description: Station commodity market from last docked station
GET /market.caveats: Data may lag behind game state by seconds or minutes

GET /shipyard.description: Shipyard and outfitting from last docked station

GET /journal.description: Journal log lines from the commander's journal file

GET /communitygoals.description: Active community goals and commander's contributions

GET /visitedstars.description: Download visited stars cache as zip (status 102 = generating)

notes: Use ?language=en|fr|de|ru|es|pt to translate locName and LocDescriptions
Access tokens expire after 4 hours (14400 seconds)
HTTP 422 = token expired, refresh and retry
Data from Legacy galaxy uses legacy-companion.orerve.net
CAPI data can lag behind game state - always cross-check with journal
